---
title: "Visualisations"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(paletteer)
```


```{r}
```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
# Overlap against seed ratios for all treatments and species 
lm1 = lm(WIDEfocalSeeds$seedOutput~WIDEfocalSeeds$AVoverlap)
ggplot(WIDEfocalSeeds, aes(x = AVoverlap, y = seedOutput, color = genSpec, shape = sp)) +
  geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(15, 16, 17, 18, 19)) +
  scale_colour_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  geom_abline(intercept = coef(lm1)[1], slope = coef(lm1)[2], color = "red") +
    geom_text(aes(x = 0.75, y = 1.5, label = "p = 0.568"), 
            color = "red", vjust = -1) +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  labs(x="Overlap", y = "Seed Output", color = "Treatment", shape = "Flower Species") 

# plot visits against richness 
lm2 <- lm(WIDEfocalSeeds$richness~WIDEfocalSeeds$total_visits)
ggplot(WIDEfocalSeeds, aes(x = total_visits, y = richness, color = genSpec)) +
  geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(15, 16, 17, 18, 19)) +
   scale_colour_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  geom_abline(intercept = coef(lm2)[1], slope = coef(lm2)[2], color = "red") +
   geom_text(aes(x = 75, y = 21, label = "p < 0.05"), 
            color = "red", vjust = -1) +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  labs(x="Visits", y = "Richness", color = "Treatment")

degreedf_long %>%
  filter(species %in% allplants) %>%
ggplot(aes(x = degree, y = genSpec, group = genSpec)) + 
  geom_density_ridges(aes(fill = genSpec)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  labs(x = "Degree", y = "Treatment", fill = "Treamtment")

ggplot(speciesDF, aes(x = PSI, y = genSpec, group = genSpec)) + 
  geom_density_ridges(aes(fill = genSpec)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  labs(x = "PSI", y = "Treatment", fill = "Treamtment")

ggplot(WIDEfocalSeeds, aes(x = AVoverlap, y = genSpec, group = genSpec)) + 
  geom_density_ridges(aes(fill = genSpec)) +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  labs(x = "Overlap", y = "Treatment", fill = "Treamtment")


lm7 <- lm(allCHAR$specialization~allCHAR$AVoverlap)
ggplot(allCHAR) +
  geom_point(aes(x = AVoverlap, y = specialization, color = genSpec))+
  scale_color_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  geom_abline(intercept = coef(lm7)[1], slope = coef(lm7)[2], color = "red") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.75, y = 0.2, label = "p < 0.05"), 
            color = "red", vjust = -1) +
  labs(x = "Overlap", y = "Specialization", color = "Treamtment")

lm3 <- lm(speciesDF$ratio_seedsPerPlant~speciesDF$specialization)
ggplot(speciesDF) +
  geom_point(aes(x = specialization, y = ratio_seedsPerPlant, color = genSpec))+
  scale_color_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  geom_abline(intercept = coef(lm3)[1], slope = coef(lm3)[2], color = "red") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.75, y = 2, label = "p = 0.2077"), 
            color = "red", vjust = -1) +
  labs(x = "Specialization", y = "Seed Output", color = "Treamtment")

lm8 <- lm(WIDEfocalSeedsPCA$seedOutput~WIDEfocalSeedsPCA$PC1)
ggplot(WIDEfocalSeedsPCA) +
  geom_point(aes(x = PC1, y = seedOutput, color = genSpec, shape = sp)) +
  scale_color_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  geom_abline(intercept = coef(lm8)[1], slope = coef(lm7)[2], color = "red") +
  geom_text(aes(x = -1.3, y = 2.7, label = "p = 0.4416"), 
            color = "red", vjust = -1) +
  labs(x = "PC1", y = "Seed Output", color = "Treatment", shape = "Flower Species")


ggplot(WIDEfocalSeedsPCA) +
  geom_point(aes(x = AVoverlap, y = PC2, color = genSpec))

lm0 <- lm(WIDEfocalSeeds$richness~WIDEfocalSeeds$AVoverlap)
lm11<- lm(WIDEfocalSeeds$total_visits~WIDEfocalSeeds$AVoverlap)

ggplot(WIDEfocalSeeds, aes(x = AVoverlap, y = richness, color = genSpec)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_colour_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  geom_abline(intercept = coef(lm0)[1], slope = coef(lm0)[2], color = "red") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.75, y = 12, label = "p = 0.6365"), 
            color = "red", vjust = -1) +
  labs(x = "Overlap", y = "Pollinator Richness", color = "Treatment")

ggplot(WIDEfocalSeeds, aes(x = AVoverlap, y = total_visits, color = genSpec)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_colour_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::ArcticGates") +
  theme_bw() + theme(panel.border = element_blank(), panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) +
  geom_abline(intercept = coef(lm11)[1], slope = coef(lm11)[2], color = "red") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.75, y = 29, label = "p = 0.2029"), 
            color = "red", vjust = -1) +
  labs(x = "Overlap", y = "Pollinator Visitation", color = "Treatment")


```
